column3: 1. Which device do you use the most during the day?
column4: 2. What is your average daily screen time (combining all devices e.g. 6.7)?
column5: 3. What is the longest you typically look at a screen WITHOUT taking a break?
column6: 4. At what distance do you usually hold/view your screen?
column7: 5. In what lighting condition do you mostly use your devices?
column8: 6. Do you use "Night Mode," "Eye Comfort Shield," or "Blue Light Filters"?
column9: 7. Screen Position: Where is the top of your screen relative to your eyes?
column10: 8. Do your parents (father or mother) wear glasses for distance vision?
column11: 9. How many liters of water do you drink daily? (Hydration affects dry eyes)
column12: 10. Do you consciously try to blink often while using screens?
column13: 11. Do you currently wear spectacles (glasses) or contact lenses?
column14: 12. How frequently do you experience symptoms like headache, dry eyes, or blurred vision after using devices?
